title: Fix support disable task by name (#6853)
body:
Adds support for disable <task_name> (including dotted task scope resolution cases already covered by regressions, fixes #6853) and fixes a related runtime issue where killing a forked task process could leave fork..join blocked due to miscounting completed tasks. Adds in a number of regression test cases to exercise the change.

As a note I did tackle this with genai (which seems to be allowed).
